mapper.sql: id, employee_no, name, gender, phone, email, id_card, birthday, registered_address, current_address, dept_id, position_id, grade, report_to, work_location, entry_type, salary_account_id, base_salary, bank_account, bank_name, status, entry_date, regular_date, resign_date, user_id, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM employee WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM employee WHERE id_card = #{idCard} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM employee WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND status IN (1, 2, 3)
SELECT FROM employee ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT dept_id AS deptId, status AS status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM employee WHERE status IN (1, 2, 3) GROUP BY dept_id, status
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE position_id = #{positionId} AND status IN (1, 2, 3)
SELECT FROM employee WHERE status = 1 AND regular_date IS NOT NULL AND regular_date BETWEEN CURDATE() AND DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee ( employee_no, name, gender, phone, email, id_card, birthday, registered_address, current_address, dept_id, position_id, grade, report_to, work_location, entry_type, salary_account_id, base_salary, bank_account, bank_name, status, entry_date, regular_date, resign_date, user_id ) VALUES ( #{employeeNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{idCard}, #{birthday}, #{registeredAddress}, #{currentAddress}, #{deptId}, #{positionId}, #{grade}, #{reportTo}, #{workLocation}, #{entryType}, #{salaryAccountId}, #{baseSalary}, #{bankAccount}, #{bankName}, #{status}, #{entryDate}, #{regularDate}, #{resignDate}, #{userId} )
